visual_description:
The audio is filled with a tense and suspenseful electronic score. A low, pulsing synthesizer beat creates a steady, rhythmic foundation, evoking a feeling of quiet urgency and anticipation. Layered over this is a high-pitched, shimmering synth melody that adds a sense of mystery and intrigue. The overall mood is one of focused tension, as if building up to a significant or clandestine event. There is no dialogue or other sound effects present.

The scene opens with a medium close-up of a man in a dimly lit room. He has dark hair and is wearing a light-colored, possibly white, collared shirt. He is leaning forward, looking intently towards the right of the frame. In his right hand, he holds a small, dark object, possibly a pen or a small tool, and gestures with it as if explaining something. The background is dark and indistinct, with a computer monitor visible behind him, its blue light reflecting on the wall. In the upper left corner, white Chinese characters, "风行网," are displayed. The camera is static, holding a steady shot on the man.
